summary: Comprehensive final testing for Trend Syria e-commerce app. All 4 user types (customer, food_seller, driver, admin) login successfully. Backend APIs 100% working. Frontend loads correctly with splash screen, logo, 12 categories, 12 templates. Driver dashboard shows chat/help buttons. Admin dashboard shows emergency help tab.
seed_data_creation: None needed - all test users already exist
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. All 4 user roles work. SplashScreen shows on app load and auto-hides after 2.5s. Logo is the new cart design. 12 categories and 12 templates verified. Emergency help system working for drivers and admin. Rate limiting is active on login API (60s cooldown after rapid attempts).

splash_screen.description: Shows logo animation for 2.5s then fades to homepage

logo_in_header.description: New logo (cart with lightning bolt) visible in header

products_display.description: 110 products available, showing in flash deals and trending sections

driver_dashboard_buttons.description: Chat customer and Help request buttons present in driver order cards

admin_emergency_help_tab.description: Emergency help tab (طلبات طارئة) visible in admin dashboard

seller_dashboard.description: Food seller dashboard loads with menu items and stats

api_rate_limiting.note: Rate limiting active on login endpoint - returns 429 after multiple rapid attempts
